title: tephrosia gossweileri
intro: Tephrosia gossweileri, also known as the Angola tephrosia, is a plant species native to Angola, commonly found in the savannas and grasslands of the region. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia gossweileri include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although the plant's safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
